status: static prototype, buyer-facing guided demo surface hardened
root_behavior: Root landing page directs visitors only to the guided vendor-risk route and redirects after 12 seconds.
core_workflow: AI-generated vendor recommendation in -> defensible Trust Decision Record out
release_guardrails: Vendor-risk guided route remains the primary buyer-facing demo.
ATDR workbench remains internal inspection only and must not be surfaced as the public demo.
Operator checklist route has been removed from the product surface.
Legacy Trust Kernel remains preserved and is not restored as root.
Do not claim CRM/Google Sheet capture succeeded unless endpoint is configured and POST succeeds.
Do not treat SOC 2 as automatic approval.
Do not treat framework mapping as compliance proof.
Do not return Medium confidence for unsupported out-of-scope inputs.
static_prototype_limitations: Browser Print / Save PDF is current PDF path
CRM capture is local/pending until REPORT_CAPTURE_ENDPOINT is configured
